281тЖТasync def export_attendance_excel(month: Optional[str] = None, db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
282тЖТ    import pandas as pd
283тЖТ    if not month:
284тЖТ        month = datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y-%m")
285тЖТ    workers = db.query(models.Operator).filter(models.Operator.is_active == 1).all()
286тЖТ    records = db.query(models.Attendance).filter(models.Attendance.date.like(f"{month}%")).all()
287тЖТ    lookup = {}
288тЖТ    for r in records:
289тЖТ        lookup[(r.worker_id, r.date)] = r.status
290тЖТ    year, mon = map(int, month.split('-'))
291тЖТ    import calendar
292тЖТ    days_in_month = calendar.monthrange(year, mon)[1]
293тЖТ    rows = []
294тЖТ    for w in workers:
295тЖТ        row = {"Ism": w.name, "Lavozim": w.position, "Smena": w.shift_type}
296тЖТ        present_count = 0
297тЖТ        for d in range(1, days_in_month + 1):
298тЖТ            date_str = f"{month}-{d:02d}"
299тЖТ            status = lookup.get((w.id, date_str), "")
300тЖТ            if status == "PRESENT":
301тЖТ                row[f"{d}"] = "+"
302тЖТ                present_count += 1
303тЖТ            elif status == "ABSENT":
304тЖТ                row[f"{d}"] = "-"
305тЖТ            elif status == "REST":
306тЖТ                row[f"{d}"] = "D"
307тЖТ            else:
308тЖТ                row[f"{d}"] = ""
309тЖТ        row["Jami ish kuni"] = present_count
310тЖТ        rows.append(row)
311тЖТ    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
312тЖТ    output = io.BytesIO()
313тЖТ    with pd.ExcelWriter(output, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
314тЖТ        df.to_excel(writer, index=False, sheet_name=f'Tabel {month}')
315тЖТ    output.seek(0)
316тЖТ    return StreamingResponse(output, media_type="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
317тЖТ                            headers={"Content-Disposition": f"attachment; filename=tabel_{month}.xlsx"})

401тЖТ# тФАтФАтФА MACHINES тФАтФАтФА
402тЖТ@app.get("/machines")
403тЖТasync def read_machines(db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
404тЖТ    machines = db.query(models.Machine).all()
405тЖТ    results = []
406тЖТ    now = datetime.utcnow()
407тЖТ    for m in machines:
408тЖТ        remaining = max(0.0, m.initial_asnova_length - (m.current_total_meters - m.meters_at_fill))
409тЖТ        is_esp_online = m.last_seen and (now - m.last_seen).total_seconds() < 60
410тЖТ        if not is_esp_online:
411тЖТ            status = "OFFLINE"
412тЖТ        elif m.current_baud == 0:
413тЖТ            status = "ESP_ONLINE_NO_SIGNAL"
414тЖТ        elif remaining <= 0:
415тЖТ            status = "ASNOVA_EMPTY"
416тЖТ        else:
417тЖТ            status = "RUNNING"
418тЖТ        results.append({
419тЖТ            "id": m.id, "status": status, "category_id": m.category_id,
420тЖТ            "meters": round(m.current_total_meters, 2), "shift_meters": round(m.shift_meters, 2),
421тЖТ            "remaining": round(remaining, 2), "initial_asnova_length": m.initial_asnova_length,
422тЖТ            "meters_at_fill": m.meters_at_fill, "baud": m.current_baud, "protocol": m.current_protocol,
423тЖТ            "connection_source": m.connection_source, "preferred_source": m.preferred_source,
424тЖТ            "last_seen": m.last_seen.isoformat() if m.last_seen else None,
425тЖТ            "sys_info": {
426тЖТ                "ram": {"free": m.esp_free_ram, "total": m.esp_total_ram},
427тЖТ                "rom": {"free": m.esp_free_rom, "total": m.esp_total_rom},
428тЖТ                "cpu": m.esp_cpu_freq,
429тЖТ                "wifi": {"ssid": m.esp_wifi_ssid, "rssi": m.esp_wifi_rssi}
430тЖТ            }
431тЖТ        })
432тЖТ    return results

599тЖТ# тФАтФАтФА MONTHLY REPORT тФАтФАтФА
600тЖТ@app.get("/reports/monthly/excel")
601тЖТasync def get_monthly_report_excel(month: Optional[str] = None, db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
602тЖТ    import pandas as pd
603тЖТ    import calendar
604тЖТ    if not month:
605тЖТ        month = datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y-%m")
606тЖТ    year, mon = map(int, month.split('-'))
607тЖТ    days_in_month = calendar.monthrange(year, mon)[1]
608тЖТ
609тЖТ    operators = db.query(models.Operator).filter(models.Operator.is_active == 1, models.Operator.position == "Operator").all()
610тЖТ
611тЖТ    # Get all daily plans for this month
612тЖТ    plans = db.query(models.DailyPlan).filter(models.DailyPlan.date.like(f"{month}%")).all()
613тЖТ    plan_map = {}
614тЖТ    for p in plans:
615тЖТ        key = (p.operator_id, p.date)
616тЖТ        if key not in plan_map:
617тЖТ            plan_map[key] = {"plan": 0, "actual": 0}
618тЖТ        plan_map[key]["plan"] += p.plan_meters
619тЖТ        plan_map[key]["actual"] += p.actual_meters
620тЖТ
621тЖТ    # Get assignments
622тЖТ    assignments = db.query(models.Assignment).filter(models.Assignment.is_active == 1).all()
623тЖТ    op_machines = {}
624тЖТ    for a in assignments:
625тЖТ        if a.operator_id not in op_machines:
626тЖТ            op_machines[a.operator_id] = []
627тЖТ        op_machines[a.operator_id].append(a.machine_id)
628тЖТ
629тЖТ    rows = []
630тЖТ    for op in operators:
631тЖТ        machines = op_machines.get(op.id, [])
632тЖТ        row = {"Operator": op.name, "Stanoklar": ", ".join(machines) if machines else "тАФ"}
633тЖТ        total_plan = 0
634тЖТ        total_actual = 0
635тЖТ        for d in range(1, days_in_month + 1):
636тЖТ            date_str = f"{month}-{d:02d}"
637тЖТ            key = (op.id, date_str)
638тЖТ            info = plan_map.get(key, {"plan": 0, "actual": 0})
639тЖТ            plan_val = info["plan"]
640тЖТ            actual_val = info["actual"]
641тЖТ            if plan_val > 0:
642тЖТ                pct = round((actual_val / plan_val) * 100, 0) if plan_val > 0 else 0
643тЖТ                row[f"{d}"] = f"{int(actual_val)}/{int(plan_val)} ({int(pct)}%)"
644тЖТ            else:
645тЖТ                row[f"{d}"] = "тАФ"
646тЖТ            total_plan += plan_val
647тЖТ            total_actual += actual_val
648тЖТ        row["Jami reja"] = int(total_plan)
649тЖТ        row["Jami bajarildi"] = int(total_actual)
650тЖТ        row["Umumiy %"] = round((total_actual / total_plan) * 100, 1) if total_plan > 0 else 0
651тЖТ        rows.append(row)
652тЖТ
653тЖТ    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
654тЖТ    output = io.BytesIO()
655тЖТ    with pd.ExcelWriter(output, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
656тЖТ        df.to_excel(writer, index=False, sheet_name=f'Operator {month}')
657тЖТ    output.seek(0)
658тЖТ    return StreamingResponse(output, media_type="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
659тЖТ                            headers={"Content-Disposition": f"attachment; filename=operator_report_{month}.xlsx"})
